subject: skills/psm-cross-version
verdict: Skill is lean and coherent; one actionable medium — missing guard for cross-module ps-static-scan.py dependency — leaves first-time users who lack psm-validate silently stranded.
summary: psm-cross-version is well-structured: the rencana→konfirmasi→terapkan→verifikasi invariant is enforced at every gate, working-state artifact is wired, and headless mode is explicit. One medium finding: the Analisis step depends on psm-validate's ps-static-scan.py with no documented fallback, so a user without psm-validate hits a silent failure at the first meaningful step.

themes.title: Undocumented cross-module dependency failure path
themes.root_cause: ps-static-scan.py lives in psm-validate, but psm-cross-version has no guard or message for when the script is missing. A user installing only psm-cross-version hits an error at the first substantive step with no guidance.
themes.action: Add one line to the Analisis section: 'Bila script tidak ditemukan, beri tahu Budi bahwa psm-validate harus terinstal di {project-root}/skills/psm-validate/ dan hentikan.' This resolves both the architecture coherence gap and the enhancement missing-dep pattern.

themes.title: Path-scanner false positives on artifacts
themes.root_cause: scan-path-standards.py scans .analysis/ and .memlog.md. All 14 highs are in generated report files and process memory, not source files.

strengths: Critical invariants (never apply without approved plan, never declare done before psm-validate passes all three versions) are stated once and enforced at the right gate — not scattered.
Working artifact (.psm-cross-plan.md) doubles as resume artifact — session continuity is built into the design.
Headless mode is explicit and complete: assumption logging via memlog.py, no interactive gates, structured return.
version-safe-patterns.md (1993 tokens) is a dense, self-contained reference catalog — no back-references to SKILL.md, fully self-sufficient if SKILL.md is compacted.
Analisis correctly delegates to a deterministic script rather than asking the model to re-derive facts from source.

recommendations.action: In SKILL.md Analisis section, after the uv run command, add: 'Bila script tidak ditemukan, beri tahu Budi bahwa psm-validate harus terinstal di {project-root}/skills/psm-validate/ lalu hentikan — jangan lanjut tanpa peta risiko.' This resolves the silent failure path.
Add a minimal customize.toml with [workflow] section containing persistent_facts pointing to project-context.md glob. This surfaces project context automatically at activation without manual reading.

journeys.name: Normal flow
journeys.steps: Activation → config load → module path → resume check → augment KB → static scan → plan → confirm → apply → psm-validate → summary

journeys.name: Resume flow
journeys.steps: Activation → detect .psm-cross-plan.md → read last state → continue from last pending change

journeys.name: Headless flow
journeys.steps: Args parse → static scan → plan to artifact → apply → psm-validate → structured return with memlog path

experience.headless: Fully headless-ready — dedicated Mode headless section, memlog.py wiring, structured return documented.

findings.title: Cross-module script dependency with no missing-dep guard
findings.evidence: The Analisis step requires ps-static-scan.py from psm-validate. If psm-validate is not installed, the step fails with a Python error and no skill-level guidance. User is stranded at step 1 of a destructive workflow with no recovery message.
findings.recommendation: After the uv run command, add one sentence: 'Bila script tidak ditemukan, beri tahu Budi bahwa psm-validate harus terinstal di {project-root}/skills/psm-validate/ lalu hentikan.'

findings.title: Path-scanner false positives on .analysis/ artifacts and .memlog.md
findings.evidence: 14 highs from scan-path-standards.py — all in generated artifacts and process memory. Source files (SKILL.md, references/version-safe-patterns.md) are path-clean.
findings.recommendation: No skill change. Scope scan-path-standards.py to exclude .analysis/ and .memlog.md, or document that artifact-file findings are excluded from grading.

findings.title: No customize.toml — missing persistent_facts for project context
findings.evidence: Skill has no customize.toml, so no persistent_facts glob loads project-context.md at activation. Skill operates on module files in project root; project context (module inventory, conventions) is relevant.
findings.recommendation: Add customize.toml with [workflow] persistent_facts = ["file:{project-root}/**/project-context.md"]. Low priority — skill functions without it.

findings.title: Missing: dependency-check pattern for cross-module script
findings.evidence: The 'missing-dep messaging' pattern (tell the user what is missing and stop cleanly) is absent for the ps-static-scan.py dependency. Without it, the first-time user who installed psm-cross-version standalone encounters a Python traceback and no path forward — especially risky as this is a destructive workflow.
findings.recommendation: Same fix as architecture-1: add one guard sentence after the uv run command. Resolves both findings.
